741 GG0170O1_12_STP_STRT_CD GG0170O1_12_STP_STRT_CD GG0170O1 12 Step Start Indicator CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's ability to go up and down 12 steps with or without a rail at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
